Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface DependencyContract

All Superinterfaces:
Contract, SpecificationElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
DependencyContractImpl
public interface DependencyContract extends Contract
A contract about the dependencies of an observer symbol, consisting of a precondition, a depends clause, and a measured-by clause.

    map(UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
